title: chelone glabra
intro: Chelone glabra, also known as the White Turtlehead, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Chelone glabra include its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce fever, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Chelone glabra can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
